title: General Manager of Information Technology (GM-IT)
description:
About Kandahar Cement Company
Kandahar Cement Factory is a privately owned industrial enterprise dedicated to producing high-quality cement that supports Afghanistan's infrastructure, construction, and economic development. With a strong commitment to quality, operational excellence, and sustainability, the factory applies modern manufacturing practices and effective financial and operational management while ensuring compliance with applicable laws and industry standards.
As an important contributor to Afghanistan's industrial sector, Kandahar Cement Factory is committed to creating employment opportunities, supporting private sector growth, and contributing to the country's long-term economic development. Through continuous improvement, innovation, and responsible business practices, the factory strives to meet the evolving needs of the construction industry while delivering lasting value to its customers, employees, and stakeholders.

Job Descriptions
Support the factory's production processes by ensuring the reliability, stability, and efficient operation of the Information Technology (IT) infrastructure. Monitor, identify, troubleshoot, and resolve technical issues in a timely manner to ensure uninterrupted operations and provide effective IT support across all factory departments.
Ensure the security of the organization's information systems, databases, and critical information assets by designing, implementing, and continuously monitoring effective security controls. Safeguard the confidentiality, integrity, and availability of organizational data in accordance with established cybersecurity standards, industry best practices, and the organization's information security policies.
Lead digital transformation initiatives by leveraging Information Technology (IT) solutions to automate and optimize administrative and operational processes, improve organizational efficiency and productivity, streamline workflows, and support data-driven decision-making across the organization.
Develop, implement, and oversee comprehensive Information Technology (IT) policies, standards, and operating procedures to ensure the effective governance, monitoring, security, and optimal utilization of IT resources across all functional areas of the factory, while supporting operational efficiency, regulatory compliance, and organizational objectives.
Key Responsibilities :
Plan, design, implement, and manage the organization's Information Technology (IT) infrastructure, including enterprise networks, servers, telecommunications systems, and related technologies, to ensure high availability, reliability, scalability, security, and optimal performance in support of organizational operations and strategic objectives.
Ensure the continuous availability, stability, and security of enterprise networks, servers, databases, cloud environments, and cybersecurity infrastructure by implementing proactive monitoring, preventive maintenance, regular data backup and recovery procedures, and comprehensive information security controls to safeguard organizational data and ensure business continuity.
Oversee the management of on-premises data centers and cloud services, continuously monitor the performance, availability, and reliability of IT systems, and implement continuous improvement initiatives to enhance operational efficiency, system resilience, scalability, and long-term sustainability.
Develop, manage, and monitor the Information Technology (IT) budget while conducting strategic forecasting and planning for future technical, operational, and infrastructure requirements to ensure the cost-effective allocation of resources and alignment with the organization's long-term business objectives.
Manage and strengthen the security of information systems and databases by designing, implementing, and continuously monitoring robust security controls that protect the confidentiality, integrity, and availability of organizational information assets, ensuring compliance with cybersecurity standards, regulatory requirements, and industry best practices.
Develop, implement, and continuously enhance cybersecurity policies, standards, and procedures in alignment with internationally recognized frameworks, including ISO/IEC 27001, the NIST Cybersecurity Framework, and other relevant best practices; administer identity and access management (IAM) controls through the effective assignment and monitoring of user access privileges; and ensure the confidentiality, integrity, and availability of sensitive organizational information through the implementation of comprehensive security governance, risk management, and data protection measures.
Conduct comprehensive cybersecurity risk assessments and implement effective risk management strategies; develop and execute incident prevention, detection, response, and recovery plans to address cybersecurity threats and security incidents; and design and deliver ongoing cybersecurity awareness and training programs to promote security best practices and strengthen the organization's overall security culture among Information Technology (IT) users and employees.
Lead the digital transformation of organizational and administrative processes by designing and implementing modern digital technologies and enterprise information systems that automate business operations, optimize information and data management, improve workflow efficiency, and enhance the quality, accessibility, and effectiveness of organizational service delivery.
Coordinate and collaborate closely with production, administrative, and executive departments to ensure the effective utilization of Information Technology (IT) solutions, support business process optimization, and drive continuous improvement of core operational workflows across the organization.
Establish and maintain effective professional working relationships across organizational units and ensure the timely, accurate, and structured reporting of Information Technology (IT) activities, system performance, and technological developments to relevant stakeholders, supporting informed decision-making and organizational transparency.
Provide regular, structured, and timely reports to the Chief Executive Officer (CEO) regarding Information Technology (IT) activities, system performance, and strategic initiatives, while ensuring continuous coordination and effective collaboration with all relevant organizational units to support operational alignment, efficiency, and informed executive decision-making.
Liaise and coordinate with Internet Service Providers (ISPs) and oversee the design, negotiation, execution, and management of service-level agreements (SLAs) and contractual arrangements to ensure optimal service performance, quality assurance, reliability, and continuity of internet and communication services in alignment with organizational requirements.

Job Requirements
Education: A Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or closely related disciplines is required. Candidates possessing a Master’s degree in relevant fields will be considered an asset and given priority during the selection and recruitment process.
Professional Experience: A minimum of 5–10 years of progressive professional experience in the Information Technology (IT) sector, with demonstrated capacity in leading and managing technical teams, as well as a proven track record of planning, executing, and overseeing large-scale IT projects within reputable public, private, or non-governmental organizations, including both profit and non-profit sectors.
Comprehensive expertise in Information Technology (IT) hardware and software systems, with demonstrated ability to effectively operate, configure, manage, and support related technologies and enterprise systems to ensure optimal performance, reliability, and operational efficiency.
Languages: Full professional proficiency in Pashto, Dari, and English, including strong written and verbal communication skills in all three languages to support effective organizational communication and reporting.

Submission Guidelines
Application Submission Requirements
Interested candidates are requested to submit their application in one consolidated PDF file containing the following documents:
An updated Curriculum Vitae (CV) detailing the applicant's complete employment history and relevant work experience.
Copies of all educational qualifications and professional certificates.
A copy of the applicant's Tazkira.
The names and contact details of at least two professional references from previous employers.

Submission Email
kandaharcementfactory@gmail.com
Apply

title: Digital Banking Technical Officer - ATM & POS
description:
Role Summary
The Digital Banking Technical Officer – ATM & POS is primarily responsible for the end-to-end support, maintenance, and troubleshooting of Afghan United Bank’s ATM and POS infrastructure. This includes managing hardware and software operations, ensuring uptime and functionality, and coordinating with vendors for deployment, upgrades, and issue resolution. The role is vital to maintaining the reliability and effectiveness of self-service and point-of-sale banking services.

Duties and Responsibilities
· Monitor ATM and card switch systems (AfPay, MasterCard, Visa) to ensure continuous service availability and timely issue resolution.
· Resolve difficult situations and malfunction of ATMs/POS effectively by analyzing the situation and identifying potential solutions and ensuring a high level of customer satisfaction.
· Oversee technical testing and implementation of ATMs and POS.
· Maintain of all communicational and networking issues related to ATM/POS
· Mobile Money
· Provide first-level technical support for ATMs, POS terminals, Mobile Banking, Internet Banking, and E-Commerce Gateway services.
· Monitor ATM and card switch systems (AfPay, MasterCard, Visa) to ensure continuous service availability and timely issue resolution.
· Coordinate with the switch vendor and third-party service providers for system upgrades, configurations, and incident management.
· Support onboarding and technical setup of POS merchants and E-Commerce merchants, including configuration and testing.
· Assist in testing and implementation of new digital banking features, services, and systems.
· Maintain accurate logs and documentation of technical activities, incidents, and changes.
· Ensure timely follow-up and escalation of unresolved issues to appropriate teams or vendors.
· Collaborate with internal departments to resolve customer-facing technical issues and contribute to service improvement.
· Adhere to internal IT, cybersecurity, and compliance standards for all supported platforms.
Participate in business continuity and contingency support processes for digital systems.

Job Requirements
Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Electronics, or a related technical field.
Minimum 2 years of hands-on experience in ATM and/or POS maintenance and support, preferably in a banking or financial environment.
Strong knowledge of ATM and POS hardware components, software configurations, and troubleshooting.
Familiarity with ATM switch systems and integration protocols.
Understanding of network connectivity and remote management tools.
Ability to manage vendor coordination and service level monitoring.

Submission Guidelines
Interested candidates who deem themselves suitable for this vacancy can share their complete profile including (application letter, updated CV, and recent photo) electronically to below mentioned email and please indicate the vacancy number (AUB/EA/VA/026-029) in the subject line of your email otherwise your application will not be considered.
Only shortlisted candidates who have completed the requirements of the vacancy will be called for further selection process.

title: مدیر انکشاف صادرات و سرمایه گذاری ولایت فراه
company: Afghanistan Chamber of Commerce and Investment - ACCI
category: Management, Administrative, Business Development and Growth, Business Administration, Industrial, Data Management
description:
Role Summary
کارمند انکشاف صادرت تحت مدیریت مدیر اجرایه اتاق ولایت فراه ایفاء و ظیفه می نمایدو مطایق پلان مرتبه دیپارتمنت مربوطه مکلف خواهد بود تا امورات منوط به بخش صادرات را به پیش بیبرد.

Duties and Responsibilities
1. توانائی در ترتیب انوایس های صادراتی و فورم (A)
2. ثبت سرتفکیت و فارم های اجراء شده به طور ماهوار دردیتابیس صادراتی .
3. جمع آوری مشکلات صادرکنندگان و ارایه آن به ادارات ذیربط.
4. عملی نمودن طرح ها ورهنمود های آمریت عمومی انکشاف صادرات وسرمایه گذاری اتاق تجارت وسرمایه گذاری افغانستان.
5. همکاری در قسمت برگزاری نمایشگاه های سالانه از تولیدات داخلی و اقلام صادراتی
7. ایجاد دیتابیس جامع از صادرت کننده گان ولایت فراه
8. پیشبرد سایر امور که حسب ضرورت از طرف آمر اجرائیه هئیت عامل ارجاع می گردد؛
9.ترتیب طرح ها سرمایه کذاری بمنظور جلب و جذب اعضاء
10. ترتسب گزارشات هغته وار ماهوار و ربع وار به بخش ها مربوط
انجام سایر وظایف از طرف مدیریت اجرایه به وی سپرده می شود.

Job Requirements
تحیصلات وتجربه
1.حد اقل درجه تحصیلی لسانس و به ماستری ارجعیت داده میشود.
2.سه سال تجارب کاری
مهارت های رهبری و مدیریت:
1. داشتن دانش اداری ، نامه نگاری ، ترتیب و تنظیم اسناد اداری
2. ترتیب و تنظیم پلان کاری در مدت زمان مشخص و ارائه گزارش به موقع
3. مهارت در ترتیب گزارشات معیاری وغیرمعیاری
4. مهارت نوشتن و صبحت کردن در زبان اینگلسی
5. مهارت لازم در برقراری وروابط بین الفردی .
6. مهارت در مدیریت امور فعالیت های اتاق.
7. مهارت تحلیل را داشته باشد .
8. توانایی کاربه طورموثر وتیم ورک ( بشکل گروپی )

Submission Guidelines
متقاضیان گرامی،در خواست نامه ها خویش را در بست متذکره ارسال می نماید، لطف نموده نام بست را در بخش موضوع ایمیل واضح سازید واسناد تحصیلی همرا با سی وی تان قبل از تاریخ 25/07/2026 به ایمیل‌آدرس های ذیل ارسال نماید.

title: Credit Officer
description:
Role Summary
Responsible for executing the business strategy relating to financing targets of the bank.
Responsible for relationship management with the bank’s financing clients base within the target market
Responsible for the day-to-day financing activity in the branches, ensuring that the bank’s policies and procedures are fully complied with.
Responsible for acquisition, credit assessment and appraisal of the customer
Preparation and presentation of credit proposal to relevant business head for onward submission to Credit Department for approval
Post approval execution and monitoring of customer requirements

Duties and Responsibilities
Acquisition of customer for potential financing in line with the business targets and risk appetite of the bank, including microfinance, SME and corporate.
Ensuring that the customer needs are fully understood and matching solution/production is offered
Ensuring the credit appraisal and collateral assessment is conducted in line with the bank’s policies and procedures
Ensuring that all relevant evidences are obtained as required for appraisal of the customer
Liaison with relevant external and internal departments to ensure that all supporting activities are completed such as evaluation of collateral, securing legal opinion and mortgages etc.
Ensuring quality of credit to avoid delinquencies and issues in credit portfolio
Ensuring close liaison with the Branch Manager to ensure all requirements are in place and duly discussed and vetted with the branch manager.
Ensure continuous relationship with the customer
Ensure continuous monitoring of the customer business performance and related market developments which can affect the customer business
Ensure that all processing is compliant to the rulings or sharia
Cross selling of other bank’s services to the customer
Post disbursement follow up with the customer
Any other assignment as given by the line manager.

Job Requirements
Educational Qualifications:
Bachelor degree in Economics, Accounting, Finance, Business Administration & Islamic banking. (Master degree holders will be preferred).
Islamic knowledge and certificates (preferred)
Relevant Experience:
At least 2 years’ experience in credit, customer relations, recovery and collection agencies, banks and financial institutions
Skills & Competences:
Proficient in writing proposals
Sound knowledge of accounting and financial statements
Efficient time management.
Good knowledge of Microsoft Office (Word, Excel, and Power point)
People management.
Financial analysis skills

Submission Guidelines
AIB is committed to a diverse workforce and encourage all eligible local applicants, irrespective of gender, disability, culture, religious and ethnic backgrounds to apply.
Interested individuals can apply using the below link:.
https://aib.zohorecruit.com/jobs/Careers/584743000007898023/Credit-Officer?source=CareerSite
Short-listed candidates whose applications respond to the above criteria will be contacted for written test and interview. If you did not receive a response within two-four weeks after closing date, it means you are not shortlisted
We are highly encouraging qualified and eligible disable candidates to apply.

title: متخصص تکنالوژی معلوماتی
category: IT - Software, Computer Science, Computer Engineering, Information Technology, IT - Hardware, Management Information System
description:
Role Summary
هدف وظیفه: نظارت و رسیدگی بر امور تکنالوژی معلوماتی، امنیت سیستم‌ها و نیتورکینگ در مراکز آسان‌خدمت.

Duties and Responsibilities
صلاحیت و مسئولویت های وظیفوی:
· ترتیب پلان کاری ماهوار، ربعوار و سالانه در مطابقت با پلان ریاست، بمنظور رسیدن به اهداف تعیین شده اداره.
· نصب تجهیزات تکنالوژی معلوماتی در محیط کاری مراکز آسان خدمت.
· تعقیب تمام اجراات انجام شده از شبکه تکنالوژی معلوماتی و در صورت نیاز کانفیگریشن و تجدید آن.
· انکشاف و نصب سیستم روی کار در داخل ساختمان و رسیده گی به موقع به تمام تجهیزات تکنالوژی معلوماتی.
· طرح سیستم های زیرساخت تکنالوژی معلوماتی، انکشاف و توسعه SOPs و پالیسی ها به اساس تکنالوژی معلوماتی.
· اجراء نصب، نگهداری و تشخیص troubleshooting
· نصب، فعال سازی و نگهداری troubleshooting of ESXi 5.5 VMware.
· نصب و فعال سازی، نگهداری تمام کمپیوترها واسباب مربوط تکنالوژی معلوماتی و آپدیت کردن انتی وایرس ها.
· نصب، فعالسازی و نگهداری troubleshooting Linux based systems
· حصول اطمینان از ایجاد LAN with Cisco ASA, IPS , IDS, Sophos Firewall
· اطمینان از تطبیق LAN, MAN, DMZ and WAN حاصل کردند.
· نصب، فعالسازی و نگهداری از troubleshooting of CISCO ASA Firewall and IPSEC with CISCO ASA implemented Layer 2 and 3
· تقسیم نیتورک به VLANs and DMZs.
· همکاری و هماهنگی در بخش ترتیب BQ برای خریداری تجهیزات IT طبق معیار و نیازمندیهای آسان خدمت در مرکز و ولایات.
· آشنایی با مفاهیم و توانایی کار با محیط‌های Cloud VPC.
· ارائه گزارش ماهوار، ربعوار، سالانه و عندالضرورت از فعالیت ها و دست آورد ها بمنظور مطلع ساختن آمر مربوطه.
· اجرای سایر وظایف که از طرف آمر مربوطه مطابق اهداف و پالیسی اداره سپرده میشود.

Job Requirements
شرایط استخدام:
· تابعیت افغانستان را داشته باشد.
· سن وی از (18) سال کمتر و از (64) بیشتر نباشد.
1. رشته تحصیلی:
· داشتن سند تحصیلی حداقل لیسانس در یکی از رشته های کمپیوتر ساینس، سیستم های معلوماتی، سخت افزار و نرم افزار، انجنیری کمپیوتر و تکنالوژی معلوماتی از داخل یا خارج کشور که به تائید وزارت تحصیلات عالی رسیده باشد.
2. تجربه کاری:
· داشتن تجربه کاری حداقل دو سال مرتبط به وظیفه.
3. مهارت های لازم:
· تسلط به یکی از لسانهای رسمی کشور(پشتو یا دری) و آشنایی ( تحریر و تکلم) با زبان انگلیسی.
· مهارت های کمپیوتری در برنامه های مرتبط به وظیفه.

Submission Guidelines
رهنمود تکمیل فورم درخواستی:
علاقمندان واجد شرایط میتوانند بصورت آنلاین به لینک ذیل مراجعه نموده اسناد های خویش را با ضمایم آن (کاپی تذکره تابعیت، اسناد تحصیلی، مدارک تجربه کاری) ثبت فورم درخواستی آنلاین نمایند. https://forms.gle/FhyBXrNTXf2r8Br6A
د غوښتنلیک فورم د ډکولو لارښوونې:
وړ او په شرایطو برابر غوښتونکي کولای شي د لاندې لینک له لارې آنلاین غوښتنلیک فورم ته مراجعه وکړي او خپل اسناد له ضمیمو سره (د تابعیت تذکرې کاپي، تحصیلي اسناد او د کاري تجربې اسناد) په آنلاین غوښتنلیک فورم کې ثبت او ضمیمه کړي. https://forms.gle/FhyBXrNTXf2r8Br6A

title: Developer- BI
description:
Role Summary
• Plan, design and analyze user request and requirements for the implementation and development of data processing systems.
• Coordinate the activities of lower level developers and programmers working within the department, or coordinate/lead a project team in the design, development and analysis of data processing systems.

Duties and Responsibilities
• Maintain all the SQL servers, CDRs, business intelligence reports etc. as per requirement of stakeholders, arrange and manage database for the said process, prepare dashboards and IT portals to manage the current and the required run rate of the business intelligence processes.
• Co-ordinate with various function teams for collecting data and analyze the various requirement to automate them requirements for generating reports and supporting data.
• Responsible for proper availability and management of CDRs based on log generation on the Network/Server, ensure IT processes supporting the CDR availability are up and running, oversee loading the file data in source tables (related to SCAP, GPRS etc).
• Coordinate with internal stakeholders(Marketing, Finance, Sales etc)to explore new functionality areas and get support for specific issues, analytical software/tools to create databases for specific business problems to provide insight to the business teams
• Entertain the requests of internal stakeholders (Marketing, Finance, Sales etc) related to reports/data availability for analyzing the trends of RGS (revenue generated subscribers) on daily basis to support them in formulating and deciding the way forward for churn management.
• Supervise the automation of the report generation mechanism. Check the frequency (weekly/monthly) of reports required by the internal stakeholders. Ensure that the frequently required reports are automated and are available on BI portal as per the agreed timelines.
• Understand advance analytics requirements; Allocate and supervise work among team members to carry out R&D work for testing of probability models for segmentation and prediction

Job Requirements
Education:
• Bachelor’s degree in Computer science or related field 3 years of systems/programming experience
Experience :
• 3 – 5 years of systems/programming experience; or, Vocational degree in Computer Science or related field and 4 years of systems/programming experience
• SQL Plus and SQL procedure experience is required
Training :
• Application development methodology
• Project management
• Joint application development
• Power BI or OBIEE
• Specific ERP training (one or more packages e.g. IFS, SAP, People soft, Oracle, etc)
Competencies:
Knowledge :
• Knowledge of the theory, principles and practices of system specification standards and applications programming.
• Knowledge of the functions and capabilities of data computing.
• Skill in the use of the programming and job control languages specific to the assignment.
• Skill in coordinating and directing the work of project team members.
• Able to communicate effectively
Technical competencies:

title: Motion Graphic Designer
description:
About Yama Ramin Media Production & Technology (YRMPT)
Yama Ramin Media Production and Technology Company (YRMPT) is a well-established media production and technology company, officially registered with the Ministry of Commerce and Industries of Afghanistan. With a strong presence across the country, YRMPT delivers innovative media and technology solutions in collaboration with a diverse range of national and international organizations.
We work closely with leading telecom operators, as well as international NGOs, development partners, and humanitarian organizations, and various United Nations agencies. Our projects span media production, digital solutions, communication campaigns, and technology-driven services, contributing to impactful and sustainable initiatives nationwide.
At YRMPT, we value professionalism, creativity, innovation, and teamwork. We provide a dynamic working environment that encourages learning, skill development, and growth, while offering opportunities to work on high-impact projects with reputable local and international partners.
For more information about our company, services, and portfolio, please visit www.yrmpt.com .

Job Descriptions
Position Summary:
The Motion Graphic Designer will be responsible for designing and producing high-quality motion graphics, animations, video edits, and visual content for digital and broadcast platforms. The successful candidate will collaborate with the creative and production teams to transform concepts into compelling visual stories while maintaining high creative and technical standards.
Key Responsibilities
Motion Graphics & Animation
Design and produce high-quality motion graphics, 2D animations, and visual effects for commercials, social media, corporate videos, documentaries, promotional films, and awareness campaigns.
Create engaging animated content for digital marketing campaigns, presentations, websites, and multimedia projects.
Develop storyboards, style frames, and animation concepts based on project requirements.
Animate logos, titles, infographics, typography, and other visual elements.
Video Editing & Post-Production
Edit video content using industry-standard software.
Apply motion graphics, transitions, visual effects, color correction, and sound synchronization.
Collaborate with videographers, producers, and editors throughout post-production.
Ensure all deliverables meet quality standards and project deadlines.
Graphic Design
Design static visual assets, including social media graphics, branding materials, brochures, presentations, banners, and marketing collateral.
Ensure designs are consistent with client branding and project objectives.
Prepare artwork for digital and print production.
Collaboration & Project Coordination
Work closely with the creative, marketing, and production teams to understand client requirements.
Manage multiple design and animation projects simultaneously while meeting deadlines.
Incorporate feedback from clients and internal stakeholders into final deliverables.
Stay up to date with industry trends, animation techniques, and emerging creative technologies.

Job Requirements
Qualifications & Experience
Bachelor's degree in Graphic Design, Multimedia, Animation, Visual Communication, Fine Arts, or a related field.
Minimum 3–5 years of professional experience in motion graphics, animation, graphic design, or multimedia production.
Strong portfolio demonstrating expertise in motion graphics, animation, video editing, and graphic design.
Advanced proficiency in Adobe After Effects, Blender, Cinema 4D, Premiere Pro, Photoshop, Illustrator.
Strong understanding of animation principles, typography, composition, color theory, and visual storytelling.
Ability to manage multiple projects in a fast-paced production environment.
Preferred Qualifications
Experience working in a media production company, advertising agency, or creative studio.
Knowledge of 3D animation software such as Blender or Cinema 4D.
Experience with character animation, visual effects (VFX), or UI animation is an advantage.
Familiarity with social media content creation and digital marketing trends.
Excellent communication, teamwork, and time management skills.

Submission Guidelines

description:

الف) وظایف اساسی:
1. طراحی، توسعه، پیاده سازی و بهبود سیستم های ERP مطابق نیازمندی های اداره تعلیمات تخنیکی و مسلکی.
2. تحلیل نیازمندی های واحد های مختلف و تبدیل آنها به راه حل های نرم افزاری قابل اجرا در سیستم .ERP
3. نگهداری( Maintenance )و به روز رسانی سیستم های موجود به منظور اطمینان پایداری، کارایی و امنیت سیستم ها .
4. اجرای تست ها و عیب یابی سیستم ها به منظور اطمینان از عملکرد صحیح .
5. یکپارچه سازی ( Integration ) سیستم های مختلف اداره در چارچوب ERP جهت تبادل مؤثر معلومات و جلوگیری از تکرار داده ها.
6. ارتقاء و بهبود دسترسی پذیری، سرعت بارگذاری و امنیت و بسایت ها .
7. تهیه و مدیریت منظم نسخه های پشتیبان ( Backup )از دیتابیس ها و سیستم های اطلاعاتی مطابق پالیسی های امنیتی .
8. تشخیص، تحلیل و رفع مشکلات تخنیکی سیستم ها و ارائه راه حل های پایدار، معیاری و قابل توسعه .
9. تهیه مستندات تخنیکی شامل تغییرات سیستم، معماری نرم افزار و راهنمای استفاده .
10. ارائه آموزش و پشتیبانی تخنیکی به کاربران سیستم های ERP در سطح اداره تعلیمات تخنیکی و مسلکی.
11. جلوگیری از تکرار و بینظمی در ساخت دیتابیس سیستم مربوطه.
ب) وظایف مدیریتی:
1 . تهیه و تنظیم پلان‌های کاری ماهانه، ربع‌وار و سالانه با جزئیات دقیق، اولویت‌ها و زمان‌بندی مشخص، در راستای پلان منظور شده اداره تعلیمات تخنیکی و مسلکی به‌ منظور دستیابی به اهداف تعیین‌شده.
2 . ارائه گزارش‌های ماهانه، ربع‌وار، سالانه و حسب ضرورت از فعالیت‌ها و دستاوردهای بخش، همراه با تحلیل نتایج و پیشنهادات جهت بهبود عملکرد به ریاست مربوط در هماهنگی کمیته متخصصین پروزه ها
3 . اجرای سایر وظایف مرتبط با مسئولیت‌های کاری که به‌صورت مشخص از طرف ریاست مربوط در هماهنگی کمیته متخصصین پروزه ها مطابق با مقررات و اهداف اداره تعیین و به وی سپرده می‌شود.
ج) وظایف همآهنگی:
1. هماهنگی و همکاری با تیم سرور در نصب، کانفیگ، نگهداری و بهبود زیرساخت های سروری مرتبط با سیستم های .ERP
2. هماهنکی و تامین ارتباط با سایر بخش های مربوط و سایر بخش های ذیربط جهت انسجام بهتر امور.

شرایط استخدام:
1. کاندیدا یا متصدی بست متخصص سیستم سازی(برنامه نویس)می­بایست که تابعیت افغانستان را داشته باشد؛

title: متخصص سیستم سازی و انکشاف ورکشاپ ملی
description:
Role Summary
هدف وظیفه: طرح، انکشاف، معیاری سازی و بهبود سیستم ‌های کاری ورکشاپ ملی به ‌منظور ارتقای کیفیت خدمات ترمیم و مدیریت تجهیزات تکنالوژی معلوماتی.

Duties and Responsibilities
الف) وظایف و مسئولیت ‌ها :
الف) وظایف اساسی:
1. طرح و انکشاف سیستم ‌های مدیریتی، تخنیکی و عملیاتی ورکشاپ ملی .
2. مطالعه و تحلیل روند های موجود ورکشاپ و ارائه طرح ‌های اصلاحی جهت افزایش مؤثریت و کاهش زمان ترمیم تجهیزات .

5. طراحی و انکشاف سیستم مدیریت دارایی ‌ها، پرزه‌ جات، ابزار و تجهیزات ورکشاپ .
6. تهیه نیازمندی ‌های تخنیکی سیستم‌ های نرم‌افزاری مربوط به ورکشاپ و نظارت بر تطبیق آن .
7. ایجاد سیستم‌ های کنترول کیفیت خدمات ترمیم و ارزیابی عملکرد تخنیکی ورکشاپ .
8. تحلیل آمار خرابی تجهیزات و ارائه راهکار های کاهش هزینه ‌ها و افزایش عمر تجهیزات .
9. تهیه پلان‌ های انکشافی کوتاه ‌مدت، میان ‌مدت و دراز مدت برای ورکشاپ ملی .
10. بررسی و ابراز نظر پیرامون تکنالوژی‌های جدید مرتبط با تعمیرات تجهیزات ICT و ارائه پیشنهاد جهت تطبیق آن‌ ها .
11. ایجاد سیستم مدیریت دانش جهت ثبت تجارب، راهکار های تخنیکی و مستند سازی تعمیرات .
12. اشتراک در کمیته‌ های تخنیکی، پروژه ‌های انکشافی و برنامه‌ های اصلاحات اداری مرتبط با ورکشاپ .
13. ارائه مشوره ‌های تخصصی به رئیس تکنالوژی معلوماتی و آمر ورکشاپ در زمینه رشد ورکشاپ .
ب) وظایف مدیریتی:
1. تهیه و تنظیم پلان‌های کاری ماهانه، ربع‌وار و سالانه با جزئیات دقیق، اولویت‌ها و زمان‌بندی مشخص، در راستای پلان منظور شده اداره تعلیمات تخنیکی و مسلکی به‌ منظور دستیابی به اهداف تعیین‌شده.
2. ارائه گزارش‌های ماهانه، ربع‌وار، سالانه و حسب ضرورت از فعالیت‌ها و دستاوردهای بخش، همراه با تحلیل نتایج و پیشنهادات جهت بهبود عملکرد به آمر مربوط در هماهنگی کمیته متخصصین پروزه ها
3. اجرای سایر وظایف مرتبط با مسئولیت‌های کاری که به‌صورت مشخص از طرف آمر مربوط در هماهنگی کمیته متخصصین پروزه ها مطابق با مقررات و اهداف اداره تعیین و به وی سپرده می‌شود.
ج) وظایف همآهنگی:
1. هماهنگی با آمریت آی ‌تی در زمینه توسعه سیستم ‌های نرم ‌افزاری .
2. هماهنگی با متخصصین، انجنیران و کارمندان ورکشاپ برای تطبیق سیستم‌ های جدید .
3. هماهنگی با ادارات استفاده‌کننده خدمات ورکشاپ جهت دریافت نظریات، نیاز های تخنیکی و بهبود کیفیت خدمات .

title: IT & Network Technician - Kabul
description:
About Ariyabod ISP
Ariyabod is a leading and experienced Internet Service Provider (ISP) based in Afghanistan, with nationwide operational experience since 2020. Over the years, the company has successfully delivered reliable internet connectivity and IT solutions across the country, serving government institutions, private enterprises, non-governmental organizations (NGOs), educational institutions, and residential customers.
The company is supported by a team of highly qualified technical and administrative professionals who are committed to delivering innovative, reliable, and customer-focused solutions. Ariyabod's success is built on the quality of its services, operational excellence, and a strong commitment to customer satisfaction.
Ariyabod provides a comprehensive range of services for homes, businesses, and organizations of all sizes. These services include high-speed internet connectivity, enterprise networking solutions, IT infrastructure deployment, managed network services, wireless communications, and technical support designed to meet the evolving needs of its customers.
The company's vision is to remain one of Afghanistan's most trusted technology partners while becoming one of the country's leading providers of internet and IT infrastructure solutions. Ariyabod is committed to continuous innovation, adopting modern technologies, and maintaining the highest standards of service quality.
In today's rapidly evolving telecommunications industry, Ariyabod consistently strives to do the right thing by providing secure, reliable, and high-performance internet services backed by responsive customer support and expert technical assistance. Through professionalism, integrity, and continuous improvement, the company aims to contribute to Afghanistan's digital transformation and economic development.

Job Descriptions
Job Summary
Ariyabod ISP is looking for a reliable and experienced IT Technician and Network Engineer to join our team. The successful candidate is responsible for providing technical support to customers regarding Internet services, troubleshooting and resolving customer complaints, and installing and supporting internet services. This position requires excellent technical skills, customer service skills, as well as the ability to work independently and with a team.
Ariyabod ISP is seeking a reliable, experienced, and highly motivated IT Technician & Network Engineer to join our growing team. The successful candidate will be responsible for providing technical support to customers, installing and maintaining internet services, troubleshooting network and connectivity issues, and ensuring the delivery of high-quality technical services.
This role requires strong technical expertise in networking and IT systems, excellent problem-solving abilities, outstanding customer service skills, and the ability to work both independently and collaboratively within a team environment.
Key Responsibilities
Provide technical support and assistance to customers regarding internet and network services.
Install, configure, and maintain internet connectivity for residential and business customers.
Diagnose, troubleshoot, and resolve network, hardware, and software issues.
Respond promptly to customer complaints and technical incidents, ensuring timely resolution.
Configure and maintain routers, switches, wireless access points, and other networking equipment.
Monitor network performance and identify potential issues before they impact customers.
Perform preventive maintenance and routine inspections of network infrastructure.
Document technical issues, service requests, and solutions accurately.
Collaborate with the Network Operations Center (NOC) and other technical teams to resolve complex problems.
Ensure compliance with company policies, technical standards, and safety procedures.
Provide on-site technical support and maintenance when required.
Participate in network upgrades, expansions, and infrastructure improvement projects.
Required Qualifications
Bachelor's degree or diploma in Information Technology, Computer Science, Telecommunications, or a related field.
Minimum of 2 years of experience in networking, ISP operations, or technical support (preferred).
Strong knowledge of TCP/IP, LAN/WAN, Wireless Networks, Routing, and Switching.
Experience with MikroTik, Cisco, Ubiquiti, or similar networking equipment.
Familiarity with fiber optic and wireless internet technologies is an advantage.
Knowledge of Windows and Linux operating systems is desirable.
Excellent troubleshooting and analytical skills.
Strong communication and customer service abilities.
Ability to work under pressure and manage multiple tasks effectively.
Willingness to travel to customer sites when necessary.

Job Requirements
Job Requirement
Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Information and Communication Technology (ICT), Network Engineering, or a related field from a recognized university.
Demonstrated technical expertise in the installation, configuration, maintenance, and troubleshooting of internet services and network infrastructure.
Holder of a MikroTik Certified Network Associate (MTCNA) certification or possessing equivalent practical skills.
Solid understanding of CompTIA Network+ concepts and networking fundamentals.
Knowledge of Cisco Certified Network Associate (CCNA) technologies is considered a strong advantage.
Strong understanding of TCP/IP, LAN/WAN, routing, switching, wireless networking, and network security principles.
Excellent troubleshooting, analytical, and problem-solving skills.
Outstanding customer service and interpersonal communication skills.
Ability to work independently as well as collaboratively within a team environment.
Ability to prioritize tasks, work under pressure, and meet deadlines.
Willingness to travel to customer locations and provide on-site technical support when required.

Submission Guidelines

AFM is looking for a Mobile App QA Tester to help test our React Native mobile application on Android and iPhone devices.

Report usability and user experience issues
Help ensure the app is ready for App Store and Google Play release

Experience testing mobile applications
Familiar with Android and iPhone devices
Basic understanding of QA and bug reporting
Ability to clearly explain technical issues
Good attention to detail
Able to work independently
Experience using TestFlight or Android beta testing is a plus
Basic English communication skills
Must have access to at least one Android or iPhone device

title: System Admin Officer
category: IT - Software, Information Technology, Linux Administration
description:
Role Summary
The System Admin Officer is critically responsible for the end-to-end administration, security, optimization, and absolute continuous availability of Setaragan Mutahed’s – Star Pay core server architecture, Microsoft Hyper-V virtualization fabrics, and database systems. This high accountability role ensures zero-downtime operations for our nationwide transactional platforms, B2C mobile applications, and multi-operator network integrations.

Duties and Responsibilities
Ø Administer servers and core services (AD/DNS/DHCP where applicable), ensuring availability and secure configuration.
Ø Implement patch management, vulnerability remediation, and baseline hardening in line with security standards.
Ø Manage backups (daily/weekly/monthly), verify backup success, and perform periodic restore testing.
Ø Monitor system performance and capacity (CPU, RAM, storage), plan upgrades, and prevent outages.
Ø Support network and firewall teams with required system-side configurations for services, ports, and integrations.
Ø Manage privileged access, service accounts, and secrets handling using approved processes.
Ø Maintain system documentation: architecture diagrams, build documents, runbooks, and change records.
Ø Support DR/BCP readiness, including replication, standby systems, and recovery procedures.
Ø Perform monthly backup restore drills to verify recoverability of critical systems and databases, document results, and report any gaps for corrective action.
Ø Create, configure, and manage Virtual Machines (VMs) on Microsoft Hyper-V, including VM provisioning, resource allocation (CPU/RAM/storage), templates, snapshots/checkpoints (as per policy), and performance monitoring.
Ø Maintain Hyper-V host health and capacity, including storage management, patching coordination, and ensuring VM availability.
Ø Implement and maintain VM backup and recovery for Hyper-V workloads, aligned with the backup policy and monthly restore drills.

Job Requirements
Ø Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science/IT or equivalent practical experience.
Ø 3+ years of hands-on system administration experience (Windows Server and/or Linux).
Ø Experience in backup/restore, patching, and server security hardening.
Ø Technical Skills
Ø Windows Server administration (AD/GPO, IIS) and/or Linux administration.
Ø Virtualization (VMware/Hyper-V) and storage concepts; backup solutions.
Ø Log review and troubleshooting; scripting basics (PowerShell/Bash) is an advantage.
Ø Understanding of security controls (least privilege, MFA, audit logs).
Ø Microsoft Hyper-V administration, VM lifecycle management, virtual networking (vSwitch/VLAN), and basic troubleshooting.
Ø Soft Skills & Behavioral Competencies
Ø Strong troubleshooting and analytical skills.
Ø Process-driven mindset; careful change execution with rollback planning.
Ø Good communication and documentation skills.
Ø Key Deliverables / KPIs
Ø Patch compliance and vulnerability closure within agreed timelines.
Ø Backup success rate and restore-test success rate.
Ø Server uptime and reduction of unplanned downtime.
Ø Quality of documentation and change records.
Ø Working Relationships
Ø Internal: IT Manager, NOC, Helpdesk, Development team, Compliance/Audit.
Ø External: Hosting/data center, backup/security vendors, software vendors (as needed).
Ø Confidentiality & Compliance
Ø The role holder must protect confidential information, follow approved access controls, and comply with the Company’s Information Security policies, audit requirements, and applicable regulations. Any exceptions must be approved through the formal change and risk-acceptance process.

Submission Guidelines
Interested and qualified candidates are invited to click Apply Now and fill in the form completely. submit their applications, including a cover letter and an updated CV , no later than 30 July 2026
Please note that only shortlisted candidates will be contacted for an interview.

title: Content Creator & Social Media Manager
description:
About Ziauddin Kamal Hospital
Ziauddin Kamal Hospital is a 20-bed private healthcare
facility located at the Khushal Khan Dewan Begi Crossroad, PD#5, Kabul,
Afghanistan. We are committed to delivering compassionate, high-quality medical
care to our community. As a growing hospital, we focus on professional ethics,
teamwork, and patient-centered service. To expand our team, we are seeking
qualified and dedicated medical and support staff for multiple full-time
positions with rotating shifts.

Job Description
Job Summary
We are seeking a highly skilled and versatile Content
Creator & Social Media Manager to join our marketing team. This is
a hybrid role requiring a unique blend of creative, technical, and strategic
skills.
The ideal candidate will be responsible for
the end-to-end production of all visual and written content across our digital
platforms. This includes graphic design, video production, copywriting, and
community management. Crucially, this role is fully equipped —the
candidate must possess their own professional-grade hardware (laptop, camera,
lighting, etc.) and software to execute tasks independently from day one.
2. Key Responsibilities
A. Content Creation & Design
·
Conceptualize, design, and produce high-quality static graphics,
carousels, infographics, and animated assets for social media and digital
advertising.
·
Create and edit short-form video content (Reels, TikToks,
YouTube Shorts, Facebook) including filming, trimming, color grading, audio
mixing, and motion graphics.
·
Ensure all visual content aligns with brand guidelines and
maintains a cohesive aesthetic.
B. Copywriting & Storytelling
·
Write compelling, engaging, and on-brand captions, headlines,
and scripts that drive audience engagement and conversions.
·
Adapt tone of voice for different platforms (e.g., professional
for LinkedIn, casual for Instagram/TikTok).
·
Proofread and edit all copy to ensure accuracy and grammatical
precision.
C. Social Media Management & Strategy
·
Manage the daily publishing schedule across all social media
channels.
·
Monitor trends, competitor activity, and audience insights to
inform content strategy.
·
Track and report on key performance metrics (reach, engagement,
conversion) and adjust tactics accordingly.
·
Engage with the online community by responding to comments and
messages in a timely manner.

Job Requirements
3. Required Equipment
As this is a fully self-sufficient role, the candidate must own and maintain the following equipment:
· Laptop/Computer: A high-performance machine (Mac or PC) capable of running video editing and design software smoothly (minimum 16GB RAM, dedicated GPU preferred).
· Camera Equipment: A professional-grade camera (DSLR, Mirrorless, or high-end smartphone with professional lenses/stabilization), tripod, and lighting setup.
· Software: Proficiency and licensed access to the Adobe Creative Cloud suite (Premiere Pro, After Effects, Photoshop, Illustrator) or equivalent industry-standard tools (e.g., Final Cut Pro, DaVinci Resolve, Canva Pro).
4. Qualifications & Requirements
Education & Experience
· Relevant Qualification in in Marketing, Communications, Graphic Design, Film, or a related field (or equivalent professional experience).
· Minimum of 3 years of professional experience in content creation, social media management, or a similar multi-disciplinary creative role.
Technical Skills
· Advanced proficiency in video editing and graphic design software.
· Strong understanding of social media algorithms, best practices, and analytics tools (e.g., Meta Business Suite, Sprout Social, Later).
· Basic knowledge of SEO and keyword research for social copy is a plus.
Soft Skills
· Exceptional storytelling and visual communication skills.
· Ability to work independently, manage multiple projects, and meet tight deadlines.
· Highly organized with strong attention to detail.
· Adaptable and open to feedback.
5. Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)
· Growth in follower count and engagement rate across platforms.
· Quality and consistency of visual assets produced per week.
· Adherence to the content calendar and project deadlines.
· Performance of video content (views, watch time, click-through rates).

Submission Guidelines
7. How to Apply
Interested candidates should submit the following to hospital.ziauddinkamal@gmail.com with the subject line: "Content Creator Application – [Your Name]" :
1. Resume / CV
2. Portfolio / Showreel (must include examples of graphic design, video editing, and social media copy). provide links in CV or Cover letter.
3. A brief cover letter outlining why you are the ideal candidate for this multi-faceted role.

title: IT Technician
description:
Role Summary
The IT Technician is responsible for managing the installation and troubleshooting of Wireless, Microwave, and VSAT links. The role includes resolving issues related to LAN network devices and addressing computer-related problems for customers through in-person support, phone consultations, or remote assistance. Additionally, the IT Technician provides technical support regarding computer operating systems, software applications, email configuration, installation processes, printing solutions, and the maintenance of customer LAN networks.

Duties and Responsibilities
Perform installation, activation, and troubleshooting of wireless links in accordance with company guidelines.
Execute the installation, activation, and troubleshooting of microwave links following established protocols.
Conduct installation, activation, and troubleshooting of VSAT links while adhering to company policies.
Install and configure LAN network devices to meet customer requirements effectively.
Troubleshoot LAN network devices and provide the best solution in case of second option availability.
Conduct surveys for network projects, arrange requirements, and implement solutions as needed.
DVR camera wiring, installation, and configuring based on the requirement.
UAT wireless base stations maintenance and resolving 1st level base station issues (in cooperation with Head Office)
Installing Wire and Wireless equipment at UA wireless base stations and ensuring 100% functionality upon completion.
Integrating technical solutions successfully done on-site and sharing it with other team members for future use.
Detailed daily and weekly reports to under-assigned manager.

Job Requirements
Bachelor’s degree/Diploma in Computer Science and/ or relevant field.
A minimum of 3 years of experience in network installation and troubleshooting or a relevant field.
Relevant certifications (e.g., Cisco CCNA, MCITP, or equivalent) will be considered an advantage.
Strong problem-solving skills and the ability to communicate technical information effectively.

title: System/ Customer Support Officer
description:
Role Summary
The System/Customer Support Officer is responsible for 24/7 monitoring of UA Telecom’s wireless network devices, recording and resolving customer complaints and technical incidents through the support lifecycle, and performing multi-level troubleshooting across network and customer systems to ensure service continuity, SLA compliance, and uninterrupted service delivery.

Duties and Responsibilities
1. Record and manage customer complaint history in the designated system, ensuring continuous follow-up until full resolution.
2. Log and maintain records of site failures, power issues, and network downtime for SLA tracking and reconciliation.
3. Monitor network performance tools (Red EMCO) for microwave and InfiNet devices, including ping latency and interference analysis, and support corrective actions to ensure timely issue resolution.
4. Monitor Air Control Alerting systems for network devices including device online/offline status, pole movement alerts, interference issues, hotspot connectivity failures, CCQ degradation, and bitrate issues, and take corrective or escalated action as required.
5. Maintain overall health monitoring of network devices in accordance with standard points.
6. Provide second-line and limited third-line technical support for customer and network-related issues.
7. Troubleshoot and resolve issues related to BTS sites, PTP links, wireless sectors, switches, routers, and other network infrastructure.
8. Perform troubleshooting and configuration support for network switches, including implementation of advanced features when required.
9. Resolve customer-side issues related to CPE (Customer Premises Equipment) and LAN networks using remote access tools.
10. Support firmware and IOS/software upgrades for wireless and network devices based on vendor updates and operational requirements.
11. Identify, analyze, and resolve customer connectivity issues remotely using diagnostic and remote support tools.
12. Generate and share weekly reports of inactive/non-usage customers with Sales, CRM, and Collections teams for further action.
13. Escalate bandwidth and capacity-related issues to CRM and Sales teams for review and adjustment of customer packages.
14. Maintain accurate records of customer installations in the designated database, including customer name, connected base station details, router model, bandwidth allocation (day/night), contact details (POC), and technical configuration information.
15. Record and manage demo customers’ complaints and ensure follow-up until resolution in the designated system.
16. Maintain hotspot user records in centralized databases, including credentials, package details, validity, and access point information.
17. Update internal communication groups (e.g., WhatsApp groups) for new installations, link termination, and network incident notifications, and inform customers of urgent technical issues when required.
18. Coordinate and arrange field teams for on-site visits when remote troubleshooting is not sufficient.
19. Maintain complete documentation of system monitoring events, incidents, and customer complaints in designated databases.
20. Respond to all customer inquiries, calls, emails, and complaints in a professional and timely manner.
21. Communicate planned and unplanned maintenance activities, outages, and service issues to customers via email, phone, or messaging platforms, ensuring confirmation and status updates.
22. Schedule and communicate maintenance activities for base stations, ensuring customers are notified at least 48 hours in advance.
23. Prepare shift-wise reports detailing completed tasks, ongoing incidents, and pending issues.
24. Ensure proper handover of all active tickets, incidents, and operational tasks to the next shift for continuity of service.

Job Requirements
Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science (BCS).
Minimum 3 years of hands-on experience in IT/network operations, preferably in ISP or telecom environments.
Strong communication skills with ability to interact effectively with customers and internal teams.
Fluency in Dari, Pashto, and English (spoken and written).
Working knowledge of Linux operating systems and programming/scripting fundamentals.
Work Conditions
This role operates in a 24/7 shift-based NOC environment at UA Telecom. With full accountability for continuous system monitoring and customer service operations. It requires real-time incident detection, immediate response, and strict escalation management to ensure service continuity and rapid resolution of network and customer issues.
The position requires rotational shifts, including nights, weekends, and public holidays, and demands high responsiveness in a fast-paced, time-critical environment.
Desirable Qualifications/Plus Points:
· Certifications such as Cisco Certified Network Associate (CCNA), Cisco Certified Network Associate – Wireless (CCNA Wireless), Cisco Certified Network Professional (CCNP), and Microsoft Certified IT Professional (MCITP) are highly advantageous for this role.

Submission Guidelines
Interested candidates are encouraged to submit their applications by July 31, 2026 . To apply, please send your updated CV to vacancies@uatelecom.af
In the subject line of your email, please ensure to include the Vacancy Number and Desired Province.
Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted for the written test or interview process.

title: Chief Information Technology Officer
description:
Role Summary
The CIO does strategic planning, technology management, resource allocation, and budgeting for Computer Services, including the enterprise resource planning (ERP) system, servers, software application development, reporting, interfaces with third-party systems, user training, identification.

Duties and Responsibilities
1. Develop and implement the bank’s technology strategy aligned with business goals.
2. Collaborate with executive leadership to identify opportunities for technology-driven improvements.
3. Oversee the design, implementation, and maintenance of IT infrastructure, ensuring high availability and performance for servers, storage, and cloud services.
4. Direct the management of network architecture, ensuring robust connectivity and security.
5. Implement best practices for network performance monitoring and optimization.
6. Lead the development and deployment of banking applications that enhance customer experience and operational efficiency.
7. Ensure that applications are scalable, secure, and compliant with industry regulations.
8. Establish and enforce IT security policies to safeguard sensitive data and maintain regulatory compliance.
9. Conduct regular security assessments and audits to identify vulnerabilities.
10. Oversee database architecture, ensuring data integrity, availability, and security.
11. Implement data management best practices to support analytics and reporting needs.
12. Build and lead a high-performing IT team through mentoring, coaching, and professional development.
13. Foster a culture of innovation, collaboration, and continuous improvement within the IT department.
14. Manage relationships with technology vendors and service providers to ensure quality service delivery.
15. Negotiate contracts and agreements to optimize costs and service levels.
16. Develop and manage the IT budget, ensuring effective allocation of resources and monitor expenditures and implement cost-control measures where necessary.

• Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or a related field; Master’s degree in computer will be preferred.
• Professional certifications such as CISSP, CISM, CCNA or PMP may be preferred.
Relevant Experience:
• Proven experience in a senior IT leadership role, preferably within the banking or financial services sector for more than 4 years.
• Baking Experience.
• Digitalization Experience.
• Familiarity with Islamic Banking and Products.
SKILLS & COMPETENCIES:
• Strong technical knowledge in infrastructure/system administration, networking, application development, IT security, and database management.
• Demonstrated ability to manage complex projects and lead cross-functional teams.
• Excellent communication skills with the ability to convey technical concepts to non-technical stakeholders.
• Strong problem-solving skills and a proactive approach to technology challenges.
• Knowledge of regulatory requirements relevant to banking technology.

title: Finance Officer
description:
About Hindukush Bridge ICT-Services Company
HKB-ICT is a leading internet and communication company aiming to make Afghanistan go online in ten coming years.
Hindukush Bridge ICT Services Company is a Kabul-based company specializing in providing internet services to NOGs, Government, local offices, and Home Users in Afghanistan. This company is 100% Afghan-owned and a team of highly qualified professionals having over a decade of experience in the various areas of ISP and ICT sector with different national and international organizations manages its operations.
Hindukush Bridge has a great partnership with most of the main players in the satellite and telecom industry. We are offering many added-value services to our partner/customer all over Afghanistan, along with a 24/7 hours Network Operation Center.
Hindukush Bridge ICT Services Company functioning under a valid License Number (66724) issued by the Ministry of Commerce and Industry by the name of Hindukush Bridge ICT Services Company the Company has professional and technical staff in various fields such as surveying, analyzing, budget estimation, project management, reporting and documentation, data-related issues.

Job Descriptions
Working with HKB-ICT requires full sort of work experience, strong interpersonal skills, good orientation towards working with people in group or lonely, strong intentions to work and grow, able to under loads and be task oriented.
The postholder will lead the development of our portfolio in Afghanistan, including identifying future business development opportunities and overseeing the writing of new project proposals. The post holder will ensure effective office management so that all functions are carried out in line with organization rules, local regulatory requirements and HKB-ICT guidelines.
The role of the Finance Officer involves providing financial and administrative support to colleagues, clients and stakeholders of the business. It’s a role that may attract applicants keen to move up the financial corporate ladder; those with ambitions of being Finance Managers, or even the CFO one day.
Finance Officer job description should highlight the need for candidates who are focused on outcomes, excellent problem solvers and strong communicators.
You must be able to form and cultivate effective relationships huge range of customer at all levels, which will be considered as key to your success. You should be able to manage effective teamwork.
You must also have strong presentation, negotiation, and communication skills, be able to make decisions concerning finance manager goals and be able to manage multiple priorities simultaneously.
Finance or Economics
Accounting
Business Administration
Mathematics
KEY KNOWLEDGE THAT MAKES YOU A BETTER CANDIDATE:
SAP (Preferred)
QuickBooks (Must)
Ms. Office (Must)

Job Requirements
A compassionate and inspirational finance Officer, you’ll need to bring substantial experience in the management, interpersonal skills, motivation to work under various circumstances and develop new customers for the organization as per the guidelines provided by the senior executives.
This remains highly important that you should be able to manage large-scale of work and load, face different challenges and work complexities, with strong and proven quality to deliver high-quality representation of the company to the society within the deadline and budget.
Beyond these critical, core areas of skills and experience, you will also have to:
Managing the budget : this includes forecasting future income and expenses, creating budgets and balance sheets, and ensuring that spending is within budget limits.
Preparing financial reports: financial reports provide an overview of the company's financial status and performance. They are used to make critical business decisions, assess risk, and secure financing.
Conducting financial transactions: a Finance Officer oversees all financial transactions, including issuing payments, collecting debts, and investing money.
Ensuring compliance with financial regulations and laws: Finance Officers must comply with all relevant economic rules and regulations in Australia and overseas. This includes ensuring that financial records are accurate and up-to-date.
Using accounting software: this is to keep an accurate record of all internal and external business financial transactions and perform financial audits wherever necessary.

description:

title: Deputy Network Manager
description:
Role Summary
The Deputy Network Manager supports the Network Manager in planning, implementing, securing, and maintaining the organization’s network infrastructure. The role involves assisting in day-to-day operations, monitoring network performance, ensuring security, and providing technical support to branches. The Deputy Network Manager also acts as a backup to the Network Manager during absences and plays a key role in supervising and coordinating network-related activities across the organization.

Duties and Responsibilities
Support in Network Design & Specification – Assist the Network Manager in establishing network specifications by gathering user requirements, analyzing workflows, and reviewing access, information, and security needs.
Assist in Network Implementation – Support the evaluation of network performance (availability, utilization, throughput, and latency) and participate in equipment selection, installation, configuration, and testing under the guidance of the Network Manager.
Network Security Support – Help in monitoring and enforcing security policies, access controls, and firewall configurations while ensuring proper documentation is maintained.
User Support & Training – Provide user support, resolve technical issues, and assist in conducting training programs to improve user knowledge and efficiency.
System Upgrades & Vendor Coordination – Assist in coordinating with vendors, testing new solutions, and implementing system upgrades and enhancements.
Documentation & Standards – Maintain accurate records of network equipment, configurations, and procedures while supporting the development of IT and network standards.
Branch Network Support – Visit branches as required to assist with network monitoring, troubleshooting, and surveys under the direction of the Network Manager.
Critical Support – Provide backup support for critical incidents, ensuring 24/7 availability when required.
Inventory Management – Assist in managing network inventory, spare parts, and related documentation.
Confidentiality & Compliance – Ensure that sensitive information is protected and that policies and procedures are followed.
Deputy Role – Act as the Network Manager’s delegate during absences, ensuring smooth continuity of network operations.
Continuous Learning – Stay updated with the latest networking technologies and best practices to provide effective support.

Job Requirements
Minimum Education: Associated degree in an information technology related field.
Preferred Education: Master degree in an information technology related filed.
Preferred Certifications: CCNA, CCNP and CCIE (will be mostly preferred).
At least 4-5 years of experience of managing networks (preferably in banking industry).
Strong interpersonal and professional communication skills.
Ability to understand data and it's usage.
Possess good process management and problem solving skills.
Ability to work in a team with a hands-on approach for tasks and should also be able to work independently.

Submission Guidelines
Interested candidates who deem themselves suitable for this vacancy can share their complete profile including (application letter, updated CV, and recent photo) electronically to mentioned email and please indicate the vacancy number AUB/EA/VA/026-032 in the subject line of your email otherwise your application will not be considered.

title: استاد در رشته های کمپیوتر ساینس،اقتصاد، شرعیات، ریاضیات و فزیک (Re Announced)
description:
About Jahan University
پوهنتون جهان یکی ازپوهنتون های معتبر در افغانستان است که در سرک سه کارته نو شهر کابل فعالیت می‌کند. این پوهنتون با هدف ارائه آموزش عالی معیاری در رشته‌های مختلف علمی و مسلکی ایجاد شده و در بخش‌های چون کمپیوترساینس، اقتصاد، حقوق، طب معالجوی، و شرعیات به سطح لیسانس و ماستری فعالیت می‌نماید. پوهنتون جهان همچنان در بخش تحقیق، آموزش عملی و همکاری‌های علمی تلاش دارد تا زمینه رشد علمی محصلان را فراهم سازد
جهان گروپ: شامل پوهنتون جهان، جهان کابل، 5 انستیتیوت طبی و 17 باب لیسه عالی در شهر کابل میباشد. که حدودا 20000 شاگرد و محصل در این نهاد های آموزشی، آموزش میبیند.

Job Description
۱-رهنمایی اعضای کادر علمی و محصلان طبق مقرره تحصیلات عالی؛
۲-ارزیابی آثار و کنفرانس های علمی اعضای کادر علمی و سایر دانشمندان و ابراز نظر در رابطه به آنها؛
۳-اشتراک فعال در محافل علمی منحیث گرداننده، سخنران و یا اشتراک کننده؛
۴-اشتراک فعال در کمیته ها، مجالس و شورا های علمی؛
۵-سهمگیری مسولانه در بهبود امور پوهنحی و موسسه تحصیلات عالی مربوطه به منظور انکشاف پیشرفت علمی و حفظ منافع و مصلحت های موسسه؛
۶-ارتقای سویه ی دانش به ویژه در رشته ی اختصاصی و کسب مهارت های مانند: آموزش یک زبان معتبر بین المللی و کمپیوتر؛
۷-تهییه لکچر نوت ها و رهنمود کار های علمی – ساحوی و لابراتواری؛
۸-رهبری و اشتراک در تالیف کتابهای درسی، ممد درسی و مرجع؛
۱۰- عضو فعال در تحقیقات علمی؛
۱۱-اشتراک در امتحانات ورودی محصلان جدیدشمول؛
۱۲-سایر فعالیت ها و وظایف که در قانون تحصیلات عالی و مؤسسه تحصیلات عالی جهان پیش بینی شده است؛

Job Requirements
حد اقل دارنده تحصیلات عالی به سویه ماستر در رشته های اقتصاد،کمپیوتر ساینس، شرعیات،
حد اقل سه سال تجربه کاری در بخش تدریس در سطح پوهنتون را دارا باشد .
توانایی و مهارت برنامه های آفیس کمپیوتر راداشته باشد
تسلط کامل به زبان های ملی (دری و پشتو) و انگلیسی بلدیت داشته باشد.
توانایی رهبری و پیشبرد تحقیقات علمی را داشته باشد.

Submission Guideline
از عمومی متقاضیان گرامی که واجد شرایط هستند، خلص سوانح خویش همرای اسکن اسناد تحصیلی،تذکره تابعیت و اسکن قرارداد خط/سند تجربه کاری را با نوشتن نام پوهنحی مربوطه و ذکر ووکنسی نمبر به ایمیل آدرس های ذیل ارسال بدارند یا هارد آنرا تسلیم آمریت منابع بشری این نهاد تسلیم نمااید.

description:
Role Summary
AFMAX is a money-records mobile app built by Mozayel LLC for users in Afghanistan, helping people keep clear, private records of their income and expenses. We are a small, fast-moving team of four — covering development, quality testing, marketing, and sales — and we are hiring a fifth member to bring it all together.
We are looking for a Project Manager / Team Coordinator who owns the "big picture" of the team. This person always knows who is working on what and what stage each task is at, tracks every task from start to finish, schedules and follows up, and makes sure the team hits its weekly and monthly targets. You will also work directly with the owner as a right hand — organizing the week, preparing updates, and chasing loose ends so the team stays focused. This is a hands-on role with real authority and real accountability: at the end of every week and every month, you are the person who can say exactly where the team stands and what still needs to happen.

Duties and Responsibilities
Maintain a complete, up-to-date view of all team activities — know who is doing what, and the status of every task, at any time.
Break weekly and monthly goals into clear tasks with owners and deadlines, and organize the team's schedule around them.
Track progress on every task from assignment to completion, and follow up consistently until each item is finished.
Run regular check-ins with each team member (development, testing, marketing, sales) to review progress, remove blockers, and keep everyone aligned.
Take ownership of weekly and monthly goals — flag risks early and act to keep work on track so targets are met.
Support the owner as a personal/executive assistant: manage his schedule, prepare status updates, and handle follow-ups so he can focus on building the product.
Call, message, and coordinate with team members and outside contacts as needed to move tasks forward.
Keep simple, clear records and reports so the status of every goal is always visible.
Spot problems in the workflow and suggest practical improvements to help the team work more smoothly.
Deliver an honest weekly and monthly summary of where the team stands against its targets.

Job Requirements
1+ years of experience in project management, team coordination, or operations (experience with a tech, startup, or small-business team is a strong plus).
Strong organizational and time-management skills — able to juggle many tasks and people at once without losing track.
Excellent communication and follow-up skills; comfortable calling and coordinating with people every day to keep work moving.
Ability to take ownership and hold teammates accountable in a respectful, professional way.
Comfortable with everyday planning tools — spreadsheets, task boards, calendars, and messaging apps (WhatsApp/Telegram).
Good spoken and written English; Dari and/or Pashto required for daily team communication.
Self-driven and reliable, able to work with minimal supervision while keeping the owner informed.
Bachelor's degree in Business Administration, Management, or a related field preferred (strong practical experience also considered).
Basic understanding of software or digital products is an advantage, not a requirement.

Submission Guidelines
How to Apply
Please read the full job description, including the duties and responsibilities, carefully before applying. The listed duties are not limited to what is written — this role may involve additional tasks as needed to keep the team on track.
This position requires someone with full attention and commitment. Please do not apply if you currently hold another job , as this role requires your complete focus.
If you believe you are qualified, send your application by email to info@mozayel.com with the following:
Subject line must include the reference number: AFM-PM-001
Your updated resume / CV
A recent photo of yourself
Your current location
Applications that do not follow these instructions or are missing any of the above may not be considered.

title: Software Developer
description:
About Hushmand Shahar Information Technology
About Hushmand Shahar Information Technology Service Company
Hushmand Shahar Information Technology Service Company is a trusted provider of IT solutions, software development, and digital transformation services in Afghanistan. Our mission is to empower businesses with innovative technology solutions that enhance efficiency, security, and scalability.
With a team of experienced professionals, we specialize in custom software development, enterprise solutions, cloud computing, and IT infrastructure services . We are committed to delivering cutting-edge solutions that help organizations stay competitive in the digital world.
Our Services
Software Development: Custom web and mobile applications using Laravel, React, Next.js, and more.
Enterprise IT Solutions: ERP, MIS, CRM, and custom business software.
IT Consultancy: Digital strategy, system integration, and cybersecurity.
Cloud Solutions: AWS, DigitalOcean, Laravel Forge, and cloud-based deployments.
E-Commerce Development: Scalable online store solutions with secure payment gateways.
Why Choose Us?
Expert Team: Skilled professionals with expertise in software engineering and IT solutions.
Quality & Security: Industry-standard practices ensuring high-performance and secure applications.
Client-Focused Approach: Tailored solutions that align with business needs.
Reliable Support: Ongoing maintenance and technical support for seamless operations.
Our Vision
To be a leading technology service provider in Afghanistan, driving digital innovation and business growth.
Our Mission
To develop reliable, scalable, and high-performance technology solutions that help businesses streamline their operations and achieve success.
Job Summary

Job Descriptions
We are seeking a highly skilled Laravel Developer to join our dynamic team at Hushmand Shahar Information Technology Service Company . The ideal candidate will have strong expertise in Laravel, PHP, and modern web development technologies and will be responsible for designing, developing, and maintaining robust, scalable, and high-performance web applications.
This role requires a deep understanding of MVC architecture, database management, and front-end technologies . As a Laravel Developer, you will collaborate with cross-functional teams to build secure applications, integrate APIs, optimize performance , and troubleshoot technical challenges.

Job Requirements
Proven experience (2+ years) as a Laravel Developer or in a similar role.
Proficiency in PHP, Laravel, MySQL, and object-oriented programming (OOP) .
Strong knowledge of MVC architecture and best coding practices.
Experience in front-end technologies (HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript, Vue.js, React, or Alpine.js).
Familiarity with Laravel Blade templating and Livewire (preferred but not mandatory).
Hands-on experience with RESTful API development and third-party API integration .
Understanding of security best practices , including data encryption and secure authentication.
Experience with queues, cron jobs, and background task processing in Laravel .
Knowledge of Git, GitHub, Bitbucket, or GitLab for version control .
Strong debugging and troubleshooting skills.
Familiarity with Agile development methodologies (Scrum, Kanban) .
Excellent problem-solving skills and ability to work independently or within a team.

Submission Guidelines
Vacancy Number: Please mention the vacancy number in the email subject line .
CV & Previous Projects: Applicants must attach their CV and a list with links of previous projects they have worked on.
Email Submission: Send your application to hushmandshahar@gmail.com before the deadline.

Submission Email
hushmandshahar@gmail.com
Apply
